response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified two songs being performed by Himemori Luna. The first song is 'Sain wa B' and the second is 'S'il vous President'. I searched for the lyrics for both songs using the templates provided and retrieved the original and translated lyrics. The metadata on screen (artist/title) helped confirm the song titles and original creators.
response.global_summary: A two-song performance featuring Himemori Luna, performing 'Sain wa B' and 'S'il vous President'. The video includes live concert visuals with cheering fans and stage effects.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performing 'Sain wa B' on stage with mascot dancers.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
小さな小さな才能だけど
私を推してくれるのなら
爆レスをあげる
ア・ナ・タのアイドル
サインはB (チュッ)
あいつは俺が育てたって
近い将来 自慢してほしいよ
こうしちゃいられない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Small, small talent though it may be
If you will support me
I'll give you a huge fan service
My idol
Sign is B (Chu!)
That guy was raised by me
I want you to brag about it in the near future
I can't just be doing this
